ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was made */,
  "booking_from_long" REAL /* Longitude of the pickup location */,
  "booking_from_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the pickup location */,
  "booking_to_long" REAL /* Longitude of the drop-off location */,
  "booking_to_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the drop-off location */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., completed, cancelled) */,
  "original_rate_cost" INTEGER /* Original cost of the ride before any discounts */,
  "amount_cust_discount" INTEGER /* Amount of discount applied to the customer */,
  "is_rush_hour_price" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if rush hour pricing was applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was last updated */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival for the ride */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival for the ride */,
  "pickup_time" TEXT /* Time when the driver picks up the customer */,
  "dropoff_time" TEXT /* Time when the driver drops off the customer */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in kilometers */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the booking */,
  "booking_source" TEXT /* Source of the booking (e.g., mobile app, web, call center) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_booking_status FOREIGN KEY ("booking_status") REFERENCES booking_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "driver_email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "driver_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "driver_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the driver */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle driven by the driver */,
  "vehicle_license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the driver was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the driver was last updated */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "driver_license_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  "driver_bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for driver payments */,
  "driver_profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the driver's profile picture */,
  "driver_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the driver */,
  "driver_language" TEXT /* Language(s) spoken by the driver */,
  "driver_emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  "customer_profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the customer's profile picture */,
  "customer_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the customer */,
  "customer_language" TEXT /* Language(s) spoken by the customer */,
  "customer_emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the customer */,
  "customer_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color code for the status (e.g., green for completed, red for cancelled) */,
  "status_icon" TEXT /* Icon or symbol for the status (e.g., checkmark for completed, cross for cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the transaction is related to */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, refund) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund (if applicable) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the transaction (e.g., processing fee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., pickup, drop-off) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location (e.g., near the park, next to the mall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver being rated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the customer */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., mobile app, web) */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating (if provided) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_ratings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer being rated */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the driver */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the driver */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., mobile app, web) */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating (if provided) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_ratings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who owns the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle was last updated */,
  "vehicle_insurance_policy" TEXT /* Insurance policy number for the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_insurance_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vehicle insurance */,
  "vehicle_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "vehicle_fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle (e.g., petrol, diesel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount offered */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was last updated */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the promotion */,
  "promotion_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the promotion */,
  "promotion_target" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion (e.g., new users, frequent riders) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)
